original text:
▲Students shouting several slogans guarantee school's autonomy front Jogyesa Temple.
April 15th, 2016, General Student Council Student Council Postgraduate held 4.15 Jogye rally.
rally also held last year with same objectives.
Goals rally criticize Jogye Order responsibility Dongguk University's present conflicts related President Tae-sik (Bogwang) guarantee school's autonomy from order.
11:00 A.M., approximately people, about Donggukians people related Dongguk University, gathered together Manhae Hall.
soon march began, marchers were obstructed police officers because cow, which prepared GSC, reported participate rally.
Scuffles broke between police GSC, able with marchers.
parade started from Chungmu-ro where Dongguk University located, passed Myeong-dong finally Jogyesa Temple.
After several speeches from students, gathered students tried deliver request proposal Jogye Order together, police officers blocked way.
Therefore, only representatives were allowed deliver request proposal persons concerned Jogye Order temple gate.
request proposal involves following three demands: Jogye Order stop intervening school matters should guarantee school's autonomy, every sunim spoiled school needs apologize resign, board directors should reformed more democratic way.

soon march began, marchers were obstructed police officers because cow, which prepared GSC, reported participate rally.

parade started from Chungmu-ro where Dongguk University located, passed Myeong-dong finally Jogyesa Temple.
